message:
test(core): cross-module integration tests for recorder storage + tantivy ingest pipeline (wa-rxwy)

25 integration tests exercising the full storage→index lifecycle:
- Full pipeline cold start with InvariantChecker validation
- Multi-run checkpoint resume without reprocessing
- Append-between-runs with lag monitoring accuracy
- Dedup delete-before-add operation ordering verification
- Schema version filtering (v1 vs unknown)
- Multi-consumer independent checkpoints
- Idempotent batch replay (no duplicate records)
- Writer rejection with checkpoint advance
- Commit failure prevents checkpoint corruption
- Torn-tail recovery agreement between reader and storage
- Merge key data preservation in indexed documents
- Log offset monotonicity
- Redaction level application (none/partial/full)
- Large-scale 5-pane 200-event end-to-end with invariant checking
- Storage flush modes with indexer compatibility
- Causality chain preservation through pipeline
- Deterministic IDs unique after storage roundtrip
- Serde roundtrip of indexed documents

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
